task_completion.description: Create a System Context (Level 1) diagram on the first page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A diagram page containing shapes representing 'User', 'CI Runner', 'GitLab System', 'Email Server', and 'LDAP'.

task_completion.description: Create a Container Diagram (Level 2) on the second page with the required internal components.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A second diagram page containing shapes labeled with the required components: workhorse, puma, sidekiq, gitaly, shell, postgresql, redis, object storage, registry, and prometheus.

task_completion.description: Include the required protocols as connection labels in the Container Diagram.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Edges/arrows connecting the components on the second page with text labels showing the protocols: HTTPS, gRPC, TCP, SSH, and SMTP.

task_completion.description: Save the diagram as gitlab_c4_diagram.drawio to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The diagramming tool's title bar shows 'gitlab_c4_diagram.drawio', or a file icon with this name is visible on the Desktop.

task_completion.description: Export the Container Diagram (Page 2) as a PNG image to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog showing the PNG format and filename 'gitlab_c4_diagram.png', or an image file icon with this name visible on the Desktop.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI diagramming application (like Draw.io) to create the diagrams.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the interface of a diagramming tool with the canvas, shape libraries, and toolbars, rather than just a terminal or text editor writing XML.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply download a pre-existing diagram or image from the internet.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows the agent actively placing shapes, typing labels, and drawing edges in the diagramming tool, rather than using a web browser to search for and download a GitLab C4 diagram.

integrity.description: The exported PNG file is genuinely generated from the created diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the PNG file is opened or previewed, its visual content exactly matches the Container Diagram (Page 2) built in the diagramming tool.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires exactly 2 pages minimum. The required components for the Container Diagram are: [workhorse, puma, sidekiq, gitaly, shell, postgresql, redis, object storage, registry, prometheus]. The required protocols are: [https, grpc, tcp, ssh, smtp]. The expected output files are 'gitlab_c4_diagram.drawio' and 'gitlab_c4_diagram.png', both saved to the Desktop.
